chapter_title.en: The Chapter on the Virtues of Prayer

text: 622 - قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «اَلصَّلاَةُ مِيزَانٌ فَمَنْ وَفَّى اِسْتَوْفَى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.622 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Prayer is a balance, so whoever fulfils it properly will receive their due reward."
